channel.title: Hpos on JASMIN Help Site
channel.description: Recent content in Hpos on JASMIN Help Site

item.title: The JASMIN Object Store
item.description: The JASMIN object store provides a S3 compatible storage alternative to POSIX based disk. It provides a number of advantages over traditional POSIX based storage, mainly around external accessibility due to the use of access keys and policies.
